title: Enchanting.MAX_LEVEL
body: Allows enchanting items beyond the unjustly imposed 255 level limit. There are many ways to crash the game with this. Have fun!!! (only works with "/give" for now) (actual limit = `Integer.MAX_VALUE` = 2,147,483,647) [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enchanting-max_level/)
